title: OpenAI Shelves 'Citron Mode': When Ethics Finally Catches Up With Engineering
author: Howard
excerpt: OpenAI indefinitely postpones plans for sexually explicit chatbot mode amid mounting concerns over societal risks, emotional attachments, and AI safety.
